case_title: FIA CARD SERVICE N.A. VS. RAFFAELE CIRCELLI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-05-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
